name: Diabetic Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients together until well combined.
2. Shape the mixture into small balls and place them on an ungreased cookie sheet.
3. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
4. If needed, add a little more flour to prevent sticking.
